biography:
Mitra Suri is an accomplished Afghan-Canadian actress and stunt performer, born in New Delhi and raised in Toronto after her family fled Afghanistan during the Soviet–Afghan war. She holds martial arts credentials, including a black belt in Taekwondo and a blue belt in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu.

She is best known for playing  Candy Cane in Violent Night (2022)
name: Mitra Suri
